---
title: '<span style = "display:none;">VisiumHD</span>'

output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
    self_contained: true
    css: adit/custom.css
site: workflowr::wflow_site
---

## Xenium Analysis Pipeline {.tabset .tabset-fade}

```{=html}
<style>
.pipeline-outer { margin-left: 0; padding-left: 0; width: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
.pipeline-wrap { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; margin: 1.5rem 0; width: 100%; }
.pipeline-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #555; margin-bottom: 14px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; }
.pipeline-title:hover { color: #111; text-decoration: underline; }
.pipeline-flow { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-start; }
.pipe-start { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding-top: 14px; }
.pipe-start svg { width: 46px; height: 46px; opacity: 0.6; }
.pipe-start span { font-size: 14px; color: #888; }
.pipe-arrow { display: flex; align-items: center; padding-top: 35px; color: #ccc; }
.pipe-arrow svg { width: 40px; height: 24px; }
.pipe-node { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; width: 130px; transition: transform 0.15s; }
.pipe-node:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); }
.pipe-node:hover .pipe-box { border-color: #666; }
.pipe-box { border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; background: #f9f9f9; width: 125px; height: 98px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
.pipe-box img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
.pipe-placeholder { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 100%; }
.pipe-placeholder svg { width: 40px; height: 40px; opacity: 0.18; }
.pipe-label { margin-top: 8px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; text-align: center; line-height: 1.3; max-width: 161px; color: #222; }
.pipe-sub-col { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; }
.pipe-sub-line { width: 1px; height: 20px; background: #ddd; }
.pipe-sub-box { border: 1px dashed #ccc; border-radius: 10px; background: #fff; width: 130px; padding: 7px 6px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-decoration: none; }
.pipe-sub-box:hover { border-color: #888; }
.pipe-sub-tag { font-size: 11px; color: #aaa; background: #f0f0f0; border-radius: 3px; padding: 1px 6px; margin-bottom: 3px; }
.pipe-sub-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #666; text-align: center; line-height: 1.3; }
.pipe-skip-arc { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; overflow: visible; justify-content: flex-start; }
</style>

<script>
var FOLDER = '<svg viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none"><path d="M4 12C4 10.3 5.3 9 7 9H16L19 13H33C34.7 13 36 14.3 36 16V30C36 31.7 34.7 33 33 33H7C5.3 33 4 31.7 4 30V12Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg>';
var ARROW  = '<svg viewBox="0 0 28 16" fill="none"><line x1="2" y1="8" x2="22" y2="8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><polyline points="15,3 24,8 15,13" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>';
var PLACEHOLDER = '<svg viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none"><rect x="4" y="4" width="32" height="32" rx="6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><circle cx="14" cy="15" r="3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2"/><polyline points="4,28 13,19 20,26 26,20 36,30" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>';

function renderPipeline(config) {
  var wrap = document.getElementById(config.id);
  if (!wrap) return;

  var titleEl = wrap.querySelector('.pipeline-title');
  if (titleEl) { titleEl.textContent = config.title; titleEl.href = config.titleHref || '#'; }

  var skips = [];
  config.steps.forEach(function(s, i) {
    if (s.skipTo !== undefined) skips.push({ from: i, to: s.skipTo });
  });

  var arcRow = wrap.querySelector('.pipe-skip-arc');
  if (arcRow && skips.length > 0) {
    var stepW = 161 + 40;
    var startOffset = 58;
    var svgW = startOffset + (config.steps.length * stepW) + 20;
    var svgH = 32;
    var paths = skips.map(function(sk) {
      var x1 = startOffset + sk.from * stepW + 80;
      var x2 = startOffset + sk.to  * stepW + 80;
      var r  = 10;
      return '<path d="M' + x1 + ' ' + svgH + ' L' + x1 + ' ' + r + ' Q' + x1 + ' 0 ' + (x1+r) + ' 0 L' + (x2-r) + ' 0 Q' + x2 + ' 0 ' + x2 + ' ' + r + ' L' + x2 + ' ' + svgH + '" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4 3" fill="none" marker-end="url(#skip-arrow-' + config.id + ')"/>';
    }).join('');
    arcRow.innerHTML = '<svg width="' + svgW + '" height="' + svgH + '" viewBox="0 0 ' + svgW + ' ' + svgH + '" overflow="visible"><defs><marker id="skip-arrow-' + config.id + '" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M2 1L8 5L2 9" fill="none" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></marker></defs>' + paths + '</svg>';
  }

  var flowEl = wrap.querySelector('.pipeline-flow');
  var html = '<div class="pipe-start">' + FOLDER + '<span>Data</span></div>';

  config.steps.forEach(function(s) {
    html += '<div class="pipe-arrow">' + ARROW + '</div>';

    var nodeInner = '<div class="pipe-box">' +
      (s.img ? '<img src="' + s.img + '" alt="' + s.label + '">' : '<div class="pipe-placeholder">' + PLACEHOLDER + '</div>') +
      '</div><span class="pipe-label">' + s.label + '</span>';

    if (s.sub) {
      html += '<div class="pipe-sub-col">';
      html += '<a class="pipe-node" href="' + (s.href || '#') + '">' + nodeInner + '</a>';
      html += '<div class="pipe-sub-line"></div>';
      html += '<a class="pipe-sub-box" href="' + (s.sub.href || '#') + '">';
      if (s.sub.tag) html += '<span class="pipe-sub-tag">' + s.sub.tag + '</span>';
      html += '<span class="pipe-sub-label">' + s.sub.label + '</span></a>';
      html += '</div>';
    } else {
      html += '<a class="pipe-node" href="' + (s.href || '#') + '">' + nodeInner + '</a>';
    }
  });

  flowEl.innerHTML = html;
}
</script>
```

```{=html}
<script>
var Segment = {
  id:        "pipeline-segment",
  title:     "Xenium spatial pipeline",
  titleHref: "xen.html",
  steps: [
    { label: "Image Processing", 
      img: "assets/index-ims/xen-im-proc.png",
      href: "", 
      skipTo: 2.15, 
      sub: { label: "Registration", tag: "Optional", href: "" }},
    { label: "Cellpose training",   
      img: "assets/index-ims/cellpose-training.png", 
      href: "",
    },
    { label: "Bulk Segmentation",  
      img: "assets/index-ims/bulk-seg.png", 
      href: "" ,
      sub: { label: "Merge Masks", tag: "Optional", href: "" }

},
    { label: "Xenium Ranger",  
      img: "assets/index-ims/post-seg-col.jpg", 
      href: "" ,
      sub: { label: "Skip XenRanger", tag: "Quicker!", href: "" }
    }
      
  ]
};
var Process = {
  id:        "pipeline-process",
  title:     "Xenium spatial pipeline",
  titleHref: "xen.html",
  steps: [
    { label: "QC", 
      img: "assets/index-ims/qc_panel.png",
      href: ""},
    { label: "Normalisation",   
      img: "assets/index-ims/normalisation.png", 
      href: "",
    },
    { label: "Clustering",  
      img: "assets/index-ims/clustering.png", 
      href: "" 
    },
    { label: "Annotation",  
      img: "assets/index-ims/annotation.png", 
      href: "" ,
      sub: { label: "Single Cell Ref", tag: "Quicker!", href: "" }
    }
  ]
};
var Spatial = {
  id:        "pipeline-spatial",
  title:     "Xenium spatial pipeline",
  titleHref: "xen.html",
  steps: [
    { label: "Density & Distance", 
      img: "assets/index-ims/density.png",
      href: ""},
      
    { label: "Niche Analysis",   
      img: "assets/index-ims/lisaclust.png", 
      href: "https://sydneybiox.github.io/lisaClust/articles/lisaClust.html"},
    { label: "Neighborhood Analysis",  
      img: "assets/index-ims/spicyr.png", 
      href: "https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btac268" },      
    { label: "SpatioMark",  
      img: "assets/index-ims/spatiomark.png", 
      href: "https://academic.oup.com/bioinformatics/article/41/8/btaf409/8205670" },
      
    { label: "svg",  
      img: "assets/index-ims/svg.png", 
      href: "https://www.nature.com/articles/s41467-023-39748-z"}
  ]
};
</script>
```


### 1. Cell Segmentation

```{=html}
<div class="pipeline-wrap" id="pipeline-segment">
  <div class="pipe-skip-arc"></div>
  <div class="pipeline-flow"></div>
</div>
<script>renderPipeline(Segment);</script>
```

Generalised segmentation models, including those bundled with Xenium Ranger, are trained on idealised cell morphologies and fail systematically in complex tissue, precisely where accurate segmentation matters most. This **Cell Segmentation** module addresses this through a three-step workflow: automated image preprocessing to composite and optimise Xenium's multi-channel stains into a cellpose-compatible format; *optional* image registration is possible to align additionally acquired images; custom model training via the *Cellpose* GUI using tissue-specific image crops; and headless bulk segmentation across the full image set. An optional mask-merging step is available for tissues requiring separate segmentation strategies for distinct cell populations (for example, preserving large structural masks while selectively transferring immune cell boundaries from a second model).


### 2. Data Processing

```{=html}
<div class="pipeline-wrap" id="pipeline-process">
  <div class="pipe-skip-arc"></div>
  <div class="pipeline-flow"></div>
</div>
<script>renderPipeline(Process);</script>
```

Following segmentation, raw transcript counts must be processed into a form suitable for biological interpretation. This **Data Processing** module encompasses the core analytical steps shared across spatial transcriptomics pipelines: quality control to identify and remove low-quality cells or uninformative features; normalisation to correct for technical variation in capture efficiency and sequencing depth; clustering to partition cells into transcriptionally similar groups; and annotation to assign biological identity to those groups. Annotation can be performed manually through marker gene inspection, or accelerated using a curated single-cell reference dataset for automated label transfer.

These steps are not spatial-specific, they are adapted from the mature single-cell RNA-seq toolkit, but their outputs directly enable the spatial analyses that follow, including niche identification, cell-cell interaction inference, and spatially variable gene detection.

### 3. Spatial Analysis


```{=html}
<div class="pipeline-wrap" id="pipeline-spatial">
  <div class="pipe-skip-arc"></div>
  <div class="pipeline-flow"></div>
</div>
<script>renderPipeline(Spatial);</script>
```

With cells annotated and positioned in tissue space, this **Spatial Analysis** module leverages the coordinate information that distinguishes spatial transcriptomics from dissociated single-cell approaches. Analyses progress from descriptive to inferential:  

- **Density and distance** metrics characterise how cell types are distributed and how proximate they are to one another.

- **Niche analysis** (e.g. lisaClust) identifies recurrent spatial domains defined by co-localising cell type combinations.

- **Neighbourhood analysis** (e.g. spicyR) tests whether specific cell type pairings are statistically enriched or depleted relative to a random spatial baseline.

- **SpatioMark** extends this by quantifying how the transcriptional state of a cell is shaped by its spatial context, moving beyond proximity to ask whether being near a particular cell type changes gene expression.

- **Spatially variable gene** (SVG) detection identifies genes whose expression is structured across tissue space, independent of cell type, revealing transcriptional gradients and domain boundaries that annotation alone would miss.
